name: OpenSheetMusicDisplay
when_to_use: 已有完整 MusicXML 且要在浏览器里自动分页、排版成可读 SVG 五线谱时用它,而非逐符号手写 VexFlow/SVG——原生手写在 MusicXML 解析、跨小节布局和整曲重排上失败;它非做谱面编辑器或音频播放器。
why_valuable: AI 默认虽能生成 MusicXML,却无法把巨型 XML 直接变成可读且稳定的专业谱面,徒手渲染接近 0%;OSMD 把解析、VexFlow 刻版与响应式重排一次闭环。

data_in._why_no_example: MusicXML 是 AI 原生且标准化的 XML 记法,schema 钉死为完整文档即可;示例会喂入大量无助于挂载的样板,故不附 minimal。

schema.musicxml: string —— 完整 MusicXML 3.x/4.x XML 文档,根元素必须是 <score-partwise> 或 <score-timewise>;不要只传 measure/part 片段
schema.drawTitle?: boolean —— 是否绘制 MusicXML 标题,默认 true

spec.note: OSMD 的 SVG 高度随谱面页数自然增长;boot 给容器 min-height 480px作为空载/首屏基线,实际不裁切。必须使用固定 px,禁 vh/百分比高;容器宽变化后可调用 osmd.render() 重排。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you already have complete MusicXML and need to paginate and engrave it automatically as readable SVG staff notation in the browser, instead of hand-writing each symbol with VexFlow/SVG. Native work fails at MusicXML parsing, cross-measure layout, and full-score reflow. It is not a score editor or audio player.
en.why_valuable: Although AI can generate MusicXML, it cannot directly turn a large XML document into stable, professional, readable notation; handwritten rendering has a near-zero success rate. OSMD closes the loop across parsing, VexFlow engraving, and responsive reflow.

schema.musicxml: string -- complete MusicXML 3.x/4.x XML document; root must be <score-partwise> or <score-timewise>; do not pass only a measure/part fragment
schema.drawTitle?: boolean -- whether to draw the MusicXML title; default true

spec.note: OSMD SVG height grows naturally with the number of score pages. boot gives the container a min-height of 480px as an empty/first-screen baseline and does not clip the result. Use fixed px, not vh or percentage heights. After container-width changes, call osmd.render() to reflow.

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):从 +esm 的 default 导出取 OpenSheetMusicDisplay(named 导出 opensheetmusicdisplay 为 undefined),再 load(string) + render()。

carriers.widget: conditional:大包 ESM CDN;构造器直接接 shadow 内 HTMLElement并把 SVG 留在容器内,无外部 CSS
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG;长 MusicXML 仅有解析/布局耗时,无 wasm/uplink

isolation.evidence: Renders VexFlow SVG into the passed HTMLElement (shadow-ok) and no document.head/createElement('style') found — no external CSS. BUT bundle contains 1 window.addEventListener (autoResize resize handler; this.autoResize referenced 5x, handleResize present) and 1 document.body.appendChild (single occurrence, consistent with a transient text-metrics probe, not a persistent portal). autoResize:true in boot keeps the window resize listener alive; boot never disposes. Shadow rendering itself works — hence conditional.

minimal.musicxml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<score-partwise version="3.1">
  <work><work-title>C Major Scale</work-title></work>
  <part-list>
    <score-part id="P1"><part-name>Piano</part-name></score-part>
  </part-list>
  <part id="P1">
    <measure number="1">
      <attributes>
        <divisions>1</divisions>
        <key><fifths>0</fifths></key>
        <time><beats>4</beats><beat-type>4</beat-type></time>
        <clef><sign>G</sign><line>2</line></clef>
      </attributes>
      <note><pitch><step>C</step><octave>4</octave></pitch><duration>1</duration><type>quarter</type></note>
      <note><pitch><step>D</step><octave>4</octave></pitch><duration>1</duration><type>quarter</type></note>
      <note><pitch><step>E</step><octave>4</octave></pitch><duration>1</duration><type>quarter</type></note>
      <note><pitch><step>F</step><octave>4</octave></pitch><duration>1</duration><type>quarter</type></note>
    </measure>
    <measure number="2">
      <note><pitch><step>G</step><octave>4</octave></pitch><duration>1</duration><type>quarter</type></note>
      <note><pitch><step>A</step><octave>4</octave></pitch><duration>1</duration><type>quarter</type></note>
      <note><pitch><step>B</step><octave>4</octave></pitch><duration>1</duration><type>quarter</type></note>
      <note><pitch><step>C</step><octave>5</octave></pitch><duration>1</duration><type>quarter</type></note>
    </measure>
  </part>
</score-partwise>
